nodes.name: Shopify Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives Shopify product/inventory webhooks. Configure in Shopify: Settings → Notifications → Webhooks → Add webhook. Events: products/create, products/update, inventory_items/update. URL: http://YOUR_SERVER:5678/webhook/shopify-product

nodes.name: Trigger Content?
nodes.notes: Only triggers content production for new products or restocks

nodes.name: Trigger Python Social Producer
nodes.notes: Sends product data to Python — social_producer.py creates the content

parameters.text:
=ℹ️ Shopify güncelleme — içerik tetiklenmedi.
Ürün: {{ $json.product }} | Stok: {{ $json.stock }}

meta.description: Shopify yeni ürün veya stok yenilemesi → sosyal medya içerik üretimi tetikleyicisi. social_producer.py Pipeline 2'yi çalıştırır.
meta.setup_notes: 1. Shopify Admin → Settings → Notifications → Webhooks → Add webhook. 2. Events: products/create + products/update. 3. URL: http://YOUR_SERVER:5678/webhook/shopify-product. 4. Set TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID in n8n variables.
